mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARD_APPLICATIONS ( user_id, card_id, application_status, apply_channel, requested_limit, application_comment, applied_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{cardId}, 'REQUESTED', #{applyChannel}, #{requestedLimit, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applicationComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT ca.*, c.card_name FROM CARD_APPLICATIONS ca INNER JOIN CARDS c ON ca.card_id = c.card_id WHERE ca.application_id = #{applicationId}
SELECT ca.*, c.card_name FROM CARD_APPLICATIONS ca INNER JOIN CARDS c ON ca.card_id = c.card_id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ca.applied_at DESC
